n: The Pact of Paws and Wings

steps.t: Grimbeorn can be found at the Beorninghús in the Beorning-lands. You should talk to Grimbeorn.
The Carrock can be found on the western edge of the Beorning-lands in the Vales of Anduin. You should seek out Varthmath atop the Carrock.
The Carrock can be found on the western edge of the Beorning-lands in the Vales of Anduin. You should seek out Varthmath atop the Carrock.
Anórohir is on the Carrock. You should be polite to Anórohir.
Anórohir can be found atop the Carrock. You should travel to the Eyrie with Anórohir.
Gwaihir the Wind-lord can be found at the Eyrie. You should be polite to Gwaihir.
Gwaihir the Wind-lord can be found at the Eyrie. You should talk to Gwaihir.
